titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/46

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=331 status=live modified=2021-04-06 12:25:54.2925+00 | translation moa=330 status=live modified=2021-04-06 12:25:52.597672+00

p.cl: Vniuersis sancte Matris Ecclesie filiis presentibus et futuris . Walterus filius Alani Dapifer regis scoct’ . salutem .

Sciatis me concessisse et hac Carta mea confirmasse deo et Ecclesie sancte Marie de Melros . et mo
nachis ibidem deo seruientibus donationem illam quam Walterus filius alani Auus meus fecit
illis de quatuor Carucatis terre in edmundest’ . habend’ et tenend’ in puram et perpetuam elemo
sinam adeo libere plenarie et quiete sicut idem monachi eas tenuerunt et tenent . et sicut Carta quam de eo habent testatur .

Hiis Testibus . Willelmo de bosco Cancellario regis . Ro
gero Auenel . Alano de Mundegumeri . DauiD de lindesei . Rogero filio Glai . hugone Mauleuerer
Hugone Ridell’ . Radulfo nano . Willelmo heris . et Multis Aliis .
To all sons of Holy Mother Church present and to come, Walter son of Alan, Steward of the king of the Scots, sends greeting.

Know me to have granted and by this my charter to have made firm to God and to the church of Saint Mary at Melrose and to the monks in that place serving God the donation which Walter son of Alan, my grandfather, made to them of four ploughgates of land in 'Edmundestoun', to have and to hold in pure and everlasting alms as freely, fully and quitely as the same monks have held and do hold them, and just as the charter which they have from him bears witness.

With these witnesses: William del Bois, the king's chancellor; Roger Avenel; Alan of Montgomery; David of Lindsay; Roger son of Glay; Hugh Mauleverer; Hugh Ridel; Ralph le Nain; William de Heriz; and many other.
